spec_match.rationale: Perfectly demonstrates the visual content slash alt text syntax for pseudo-element content using counter().

interactive.rationale: Interactive controls let users dynamically add or remove sections to watch the counters update immediately.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Appropriately emphasizes the contrast between visually styled Roman numerals and accessible, plain-spoken numbering for screen readers.

edge_cases.rationale: Exposes accurate capability detection using CSS.supports.

references.rationale: References correct spec and ChromeStatus link.

design_system.rationale: Adheres fully to design guidelines and relies on existing custom variables.

summary: A straightforward and precise demo that showcases how the content property slash alt text syntax lets developers keep stylized Roman numeral markers while providing plain-English numbering for screen readers.
